description: Minimal React example used only as a format reference for feature_list.json.

features.name: button_component
features.title: Reusable Button component
features.description: A themeable button styled entirely from DESIGN.md tokens.
acceptance: src/components/Button.tsx renders its children and calls an onClick handler
Styling uses the button-primary tokens (var(--color-primary), var(--color-on-primary), var(--rounded-md)) — no hardcoded values
tests/Button.test.tsx covers rendering the label and firing onClick

features.name: counter_feature
features.title: Counter with increment / decrement
features.description: A small stateful feature demonstrating a hook + component split.
acceptance: src/hooks/useCounter.ts exposes count, increment, and decrement
src/components/Counter.tsx renders the count and increment/decrement buttons
tests/Counter.test.tsx covers increment and decrement via user interaction
